commands.description: Generates a visual dependency graph of your current bundle (requires graphviz).
Displays the specific Ruby version required by the current Gemfile.lock to ensure environment parity.
Sets the deployment mode via configuration rather than a CLI flag, ensuring consistent CI/CD behavior.
Provides detailed information about a specific gem, including its summary, homepage, and local installation path.
Adds a specific platform to the Gemfile.lock to prevent resolution errors when deploying to different OS architectures (e.g., local macOS to Linux Docker).
